> My name is George Russell and I am the co-founder of a commercial HVAC contracting business
company.company_type: California. I co-founded the company about 15 years ago and decided along with coowner
company.description: Christina Baldwin
company.employee_count: that it was time to sell. Around that same time James Reppert contacted us and offered to sell our business. We had several meetings with James and we were impressed with his background
company.founded_year: so we hired him to represent us. James quickly went to work and put together a detailed package on our business including the company financial history
company.intent.decision_maker_intent: etc. We established the parameters the buyer would need to have in order to receive a package and then went to market. James brought to us a number of qualified prospective buyers for us to consider over the initial 6-month period. Ultimately
company.intent.intent_category: James came up with what we think was an ideal match for our company and we ended up selling our business to them. The most remarkable thing about this 11-month process was James’ attention to detail. He was there for every question we had and made the process more comfortable for us. The details and complexity were somewhat overwhelming and we had underestimated what was involved. James managed the entire process efficiently
company.intent.intent_signals: including finding and screening prospective buyers
company.name: bringing in additional support from his company when needed
company.number_of_locations: plus so much more. Everything was handled in a timely and professional matter. We’re not sure we could have managed all that and continued to run our successful business. James always seemed to know what was going to happen next and prepared us for all the steps involved in this process. We are very thankful to James and would highly recommend him to anyone looking for a professional Business Broker to sell their business.

best_contact_id: > George Russell President at Commercial HVAC contracting business

> The entire process was handled extremely professional and I look forward to working with you again.

## Why us and what you get
Enjoy customizable lists, team work tools, and smart tracking all in one place. Set tasks, get reminders, and see your progress simply and quickly. 
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/QBkCPoeejpECqrXOviZdvDrmKws.png)
#### Why LeadWave
LeadWave is the easiest and fastest way to get in touch with all types of SaaS companies.
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/2aT8NM5D6n5Eiagt1uk2XS2VEvo.png)
#### 100% Data Accuracy
Our Data Research are focused on providing the most accurate information as possible.
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/v3w3Ee0g7lOrlZtCW44t0Vafzs8.png)
#### 95% Email Accuracy
Not perfect yet, but we are trying. If any record is wrong, we’ll replace it with a new one.
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/mS28QhWcSped7JSQ7vltnisa5c8.png)
#### Custom Data Requests
Do you need additional data fields to any of our lists of Crypto, SaaS VCs and SaaS Companies Lists?
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/9U5SqSQTg0nYtzEWuxa3bJ4n5ls.png)
#### More Time
Our goals is clear – we want to help you focus on the important things, not list of SaaS companies.
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/BVf8P4osWKSlvmWmgj4pyRMjYNk.png)
#### Fresh Updates
We constantly update our lists. You will receive an updated version of the list at no additional charge.

Who Built It
## Who is Behind This?
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/c53cgf9X6ctC93ShgFLhKQugA.webp)
**Hi. I'm Vlad Oleksiienko (growth at Reply.io). I help companies reach out to SaaS and tech compnaies.**
Over my 8 years at Reply.io, I’ve seen how much time founders, VCs, marketers, and business development teams waste building high-quality prospect lists from scratch. Hours of manual research are spent just to gather accurate and relevant data.
That’s why I built LeadWave - to provide a ready-to-use, always-up-to-date list of 18,000 SaaS companies enriched with valuable data points. I also used this list for my own projects, and it’s been so useful in saving time and finding the right opportunities.
LeadWave helps you skip the grind and focus on what matters: growing your startup or business, building connections, and creating impact. My mission is to eliminate tedious research and empower you to make faster, smarter decisions.

![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F11%2F9c6a1189-home-hero-conflict.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## The right experts at the right time.
Our team of cross-industry, cross-disciplinary experts are trusted advisors who partner with our clients – listening, learning, and charting the next steps that Protect, Create, and Recover Value through challenging times or events.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/conflict)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F11%2F8edb1760-home-hero-distress.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Critical expertise in crisis situations.
Disruption is the new normal and change will continue to accelerate at a dramatic pace. Our global team delivers the strategies and solutions that keep our clients ahead. Where others advise, we solve. Where others consult, we partner.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/distress)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F12%2F5e589e9e-home-hero-performance.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## For the opportunity. For the future.
We are a firm of experts and advisors uniquely built to tackle each challenge or need, and we effectively combine the right expertise into solutions, services, and results. We don’t just talk about bringing the best together; we do it.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/performance)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F11%2Fe73f887f-home-hero-risk.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Global coverage. Targeted impact.
Where industries, disciplines, technologies, and trends intersect and when existential moments and events overlap – Ankura is there, putting our world-class expertise to work for our clients. We develop and execute creative, end-to-end solutions and provide the expertise and skills our clients need at critical moments. 
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/risk)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F12%2F1d862b8e-home-hero-strategy.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Collaborative lateral thinking.
We are the experts and advisors who advise the world’s leading governments, businesses, and institutions to solve their biggest challenges and most complex problems by developing game-changing ideas that achieve positive outcomes.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/strategy)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F12%2F9c66b5e6-home-hero-transformation.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Experts in motion. Advisors in action. 
Our multidisciplinary expertise comes together with efficiency and speed, allowing us to respond to events, and generate solutions in real-time. Integrating seamlessly across the firm, our team of experts and advisors work together in a collaborative model to address the challenges our clients face. 
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/transformation)

## Consulting Solutions
# Engage the  
Power of Kranz.
We are the preeminent accounting and financial solutions firm helping start-ups and Venture Capital companies grow. We believe that every business, at every stage of growth, is a story waiting to be told – and that all companies deserve to reach their full potential.
[What We Do](https://kranz.consulting/services/)
### Who We Are
## We give our clients a competitive advantage.
We deliver seasoned perspectives and insights, from the latest in Artificial Intelligence to M&A trends, the state of capital markets, and even the future of work. In a world of mounting uncertainty and complexity, knowledge is not just power, but peace of mind.
We value mutual respect and true human connections beyond all else because those are the only connections that truly matter. Our trusted relationships are the common thread that guides everything we do.
[Who We Are](https://kranz.consulting/about-us/)
## Our Services
### Supporting entrepreneurship at every stage.
To see additional information about the over 25 services we provide our clients, learn more about our practices.
### [Emerging Growth ](https://kranz.consulting/services/emerging-growth/)
### [Technical Accounting ](https://kranz.consulting/services/technical-accounting/)
### [Fund Administration ](https://kranz.consulting/services/venture-fund-administration/)
[Services](https://kranz.consulting/services/)
### Who We Are
## We get Silicon Valley   
…and we love growth stories
### Stories are history personified.
Stories, like businesses, are personal and transformational. They have definition and character.
From inception to exit—from startup to medium growth, to earn out and beyond—there are countless stories that shape a company’s future. And we are the storytellers who help bring that future into focus every step of the way.
[About Us](https://kranz.consulting/about-us/)
####  1000+ Satisfied Clients
####  600+ Venture Funds
####  300+ Consultants
####  30+ Years of Experience
####  News & Insights

### About
For 30 years, Kranz Consulting has advised and supported entrepreneurs and founders through the complexities of building high-growth businesses. With 300+ career consultants nationwide, Kranz Consulting specializes in outsourced accounting, crypto accounting and digital assets, technical accounting, CFO advisory and strategic finance, NetSuite consulting, venture fund administration, stock administration, and transaction advisory services.
